mapper.insert: INSERT INTO process_info (process_name, dept_id, description, status) VALUES (#{processName}, #{deptId}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, d.dept_name FROM process_info p LEFT JOIN dept_info d ON p.dept_id = d.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT p.*, d.dept_name FROM process_info p LEFT JOIN dept_info d ON p.dept_id = d.id ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, d.dept_name FROM process_info p LEFT JOIN dept_info d ON p.dept_id = d.id WHERE p.dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, d.dept_name FROM process_info p LEFT JOIN dept_info d ON p.dept_id = d.id WHERE p.status = #{status} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
